title: asarina stricta
intro: Asarina stricta, also known as the Strict Snapdragon or Strict Penstemon, is a species of flowering plant in the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). It is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant has anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Asarina stricta can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and has been used to treat a variety of health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and sore throats.
